== Notes for [[Item:Q3321|Q3321]] ==

Alcalde de los Reales Alcázares de Sevilla, seat of the Casa de la Contratacion de las Indias ("House of Trade) and center of the discoveries, explorations and colonization of the Kingdom of Spain.

He was the biggest financier, after the King, of the expedition of Sebastian Caboto in 1526 for a second circumnavigation of the World to the Molucca Islands in the Pacific, in order to find a shorter route to the Pacific than the one established by the Magallanes expedition of 1520 and strengthen Spanish claims in the spice islands. This voyage was officially noted as an expedition for the discovery of Tarshish, Ophir, Eastern Cathay, and Cipango (Japan). His son Alonso de Santa Cruz, Spain's most prominent cartographer and cosmographer in the House of Trade, also participated as an investor and supervisor of the expedition.

When Caboto reached Brazil he found out about the riches of Rio de la Plata and abandoned the course of the expedition in search for wealth. This lead to the establishment of the first European settlement in present day Argentina in 1527 called Sancti Spiritu.

http://dbe.rah.es/biografias/7499/alonso-de-santa-cruz

https://archive.org/stream/johncabotdiscove00harrrich/johncabotdiscove00harrrich_djvu.txt

https://archive.org/stream/elvenecianosebas01medirich/elvenecianosebas01medirich_djvu.txt

http://www.larramendi.es/i18n/catalogo_imagenes/grupo.do?path=1023266

https://books.google.se/books?id=SMjDfI5wUBEC&pg=PA39&dq=francisco+de+santa+cruz+maria+villalpando&hl=en&sa=X&ved=0ahUKEwipreyczuPeAhUF6CwKHUCpBsgQ6AEILzAB#v=onepage&q=francisco%20de%20santa%20cruz%20maria%20villalpando&f=false

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1916099/unitid/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1916099+-+ES-41091-AGI-UD-122362/search/0/Francisco+de+Santa+Cruz

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526/unitid/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526+-+ES-41091-AGI-UD-376726/search/0/Francisco+de+Santa+Cruz

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526/unitid/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526+-+ES-41091-AGI-UD-313448/search/0/Francisco+de+Santa+Cruz

http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/249285 http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/122357

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADAB67681EFBBFA9822EF79916CD0E1
geni:6000000009836767411


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
